Dattatreya Yantra
Mantra
dattātreyāya
oṁ drāṃ hrīṃ klīṃ svāhā

Aghori.it

NAVNATH YANTRA
The Navnath (nine Nath) are the direct disciples of Dattatreya.
Mantra
navanāth yaṃtra
hūṃ de hūṃ va hūṃ da hūṃ tta
hūṃ phaṭ, hūṃ phaṭ, hūṃ phaṭ, hūṃ phaṭ,
hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ
hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ
hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ
hūṃ hūṃ hūṃ

Aghori.it

BATUK BHAIRAVA YANTRA
Mantra
oṁ hrīṃ baṭukāya āpadudhdāraṇāya kurū kurū baṭukāya hrīṃ
oṁ namaḥ śivāya
oṁ baṭuk bhairavāya namaḥ
150
Aghori.it

Swastika
In the West the swastika association with Nazism has largely
overshadowed its religious and cultural significance. The word
swastika comes from Sanskrit and signifies well being and good
luck and it is still used extensively throughout the east as
